channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Jury unanimously dismisses Elon Musk's lawsuit against OpenAI
item.description: A California jury dismissed all charges, ruling that Musk had missed the three-year statute of limitations to file the suit.

item.title: LIRR riders brace for long commutes as strike enters its third day
item.description: LIRR commuters are relying on shuttle buses and subways to reach New York City as the largest commuter rail system in North America remains shut down.

item.title: Gunman kills 6, wounds 8 in latest shooting rampage in Turkey
item.description: A man armed with a rifle carried out a series of attacks, killing at least six people and wounding eight others, Turkish President Recep Tayyip Erdogan...

item.title: WATCH: 2 fighter jets collide midair at Idaho Air Force base air show
item.description: A Navy spokesperson said all four air crew had successfully ejected and that the incident is under investigation.
